name: tm-pmf
description: AI Product-Market Fit Playbook — comprehensive strategic assessment for AI products. Covers opportunity scoring, 4D product development, 4D strategy framework, moat construction (incl. Adaptation Moat, Flywheel), metrics, launch readiness, distribution (15 plays, 7 PLG loops, 6 laws), pricing (4 models, unit economics, cost glossary), AI PRD templates, and 60+ frameworks. Adapted from Miqdad Jaffer's AI PMF framework ecosystem.
